$comment: NEGATIVE FIXTURE — must FAIL identity.schema.json validation. A session state object claiming two mutually exclusive modes simultaneously. The identity schema uses oneOf which only allows one mode branch. This object satisfies neither branch because it has mode='alias' but also localStorage=true (which only full-profile allows). Expected validation error: oneOf constraint violated — exactly one branch must match.
_invalidReason: alias mode claims localStorage=true, which is only valid for full-profile mode. This violates the ADR-005 storage policy for alias mode and the oneOf constraint in identity.schema.json.
